Featured How wireless energy from space could power everything Electrical engineer Ali Hajimiri explains the principles behind wireless energy transfer and shares a far-out vision for launching solar panels into space in order to collect sunlight, convert it to electrical power and then beam it down to Earth. Watch now - TED
